data.name: 才不會墮落呢！天真的妖精劍士
data.detailed_description:
🌿《才不會墮落呢！天真的妖精劍士》玩法說明

✨ 故事大綱

遠離人類世界的妖精村落艾爾榭尤裡居住著一群女性妖精，

認真端莊的倫深受同伴信任，村裡剛舉行完屬於她的成年儀式，

和樂的氣氛下，安穩的日子卻被一場疾病打斷⋯⋯

會讓人忍不住想色色的神秘疾病「暗沉」悄悄蔓延，

為了拯救患病的村民，

你將扮演天真又單純的妖精劍士「倫」，踏入陌生的人類底層都市尋找萬能解藥──

找是找到了，但這萬能解藥也太太太貴了吧！？

面對天價解藥，身無分文又不諳世事的她，在莫名其妙的拐騙下，一步步捲入色情的打工💦

只能靠自己「身體」打工的妖精劍士倫，在賺錢的途中，也漸漸染上這座底層城市的慾望與墮落⋯⋯！？

🎮 遊戲玩法🎮

這是一款充滿經典日系風格的2D色色RPG！
＊本作雖以 RPG 製作工具開發，但玩法更接近帶有互動元素的 成人向視覺小說！

你將扮演天真的妖精劍士倫，使用滑鼠或鍵盤操作，在骯髒的下層都市中探索、與形形色色的居民互動，尋找打工賺錢的機會。

你的最終目標就是靠打工賺到足夠的金錢，買下天價的萬能解藥，拯救故鄉的精靈村莊！

接觸更多工作，你將逐步解鎖各種刺激的H事件。

隨著「背德值」上升，H事件中倫的外貌與對話也會出現變化，逐漸墮落！

普通結局、真實救贖、完全墮落⋯⋯三種結局，你的選擇決定她的命運！

*️⃣道具：如酒類、香菸等，可用來提升或降低背德數值

🔢數值系統：遊戲內各項參數無上限，暗沉程度也會影響外觀


💬 「沒關係的，大家進城打工都這樣，這是正經職業！」

──只是這份工作的內容，怎麼聽起來怪怪的？

💰打工任務內容

  • 酒館打工：化身兔女郎店員，被性騷擾時感度會上升🐰

  • 代理修女：購買指定裝備後可進行此任務，透過聽取懺悔與收受捐款賺錢💖

  • 討伐魔物：擊敗特定魔物可獲得報酬，若背德值過高可能觸發敗北H事件💞

  • 賣春：在領主的「技術指導」下解鎖賣春能力，並可對特定角色進行服務，獲得大量金錢💴

🌟 角色介紹🌟

女主角姓名：倫・艾爾榭

種族：妖精

年齡：26歲（換算成人類年齡）

身高：170cm

三圍：B110cm（O罩杯）／W59cm／H95cm

倫是一名修習了高等武術與魔法的妖精劍士，雖然實戰經驗不足，但對自己身為妖精一族感到驕傲、充滿信念。

由於自幼生活在與世隔絕的女妖精村莊，對色色這種世俗之事一點概念都沒有，性知識僅止於自慰，

然而踏入人類底層都市之後，天然呆的她又會遭遇些什麼——

👉 「這不是在色色，只是在擠特調牛奶……！」

👉 「這不是在色色，只是在講解女體構造……！」

👉 「這不是在色色，只是在量三圍……！」

──────她怎麼還真的信了！？？？？？😂😂😂

💟遊戲特色💟

👙 紙娃娃換裝系統：比基尼、兔女郎、內衣、情趣服等任你穿！

🔞 色色場景：包含差分在內超過25張HCG，另有立繪狀態下的色色騷擾演出

💋 外觀變化：越墮落，外觀與舉止越妖豔❤（膚色：白 ➝ 褐 ➝ 黑）

🍷 配件裝飾：耳環、淫紋等立繪裝飾變化，部分會反映在HCG中！

🛏️ 賣春發展：從不知所措，到初期的愛撫口交，再到⋯⋯

📌 無限探索：在獲得萬能解藥之後，遊戲不會結束，可繼續探索城鎮裡未解鎖的情色事件！

data.short_description: 嘴上說著才不會墮落，下一秒卻呻吟不止！？妖精村莊色色傳染病橫行，天真的妖精劍士踏入人類的底層城市，為了買下天價解藥，只好用身體打工賺錢。充滿背德快感與墮落誘惑的異種姦RPG！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: You Can't Corrupt Me! ~Tale of a Naive Elven Swordswoman~
data.detailed_description:
🌿《You Can't Corrupt Me! ~Tale of a Naive Elven Swordswoman~》

✨ Story Overview

Far from the human world lies the elven village of Elseille, home only to women.

Among them is Lyun, a pure and earnest elf swordswoman, just celebrated in her coming-of-age ritual.

But peace is shattered when a strange plague called "The Blight" spreads through the village, driving its victims into uncontrollable lust.

To save her suffering companions, Lyun ventures into the slums of human society in search of a cure.

She finds the medicine, but the price is impossibly high.

Penniless and naïve, she is tricked and drawn into “part-time work” of the most indecent kind.

With only her body to earn money, Lyun is forced to navigate a world of lust and corruption… and little by little, she too begins to succumb to its temptations.

🎮 Gameplay🎮

This is a  fantasy 2D H-RPG with a distinctly classic Japanese feel.
＊Although built in RPG Maker, the gameplay is closer to an adult visual novel with interactive elements.

Your ultimate goal is to earn enough money through part-time work to buy the overpriced cure and save the elven village of Elseille!

By taking on more jobs, you’ll gradually unlock a variety of stimulating H-events.

As Lyun’s Corruption rises, her appearance and dialogue in these scenes will change, drawing her deeper into depravity!

The game features three possible endings: Normal, True Salvation, or Complete Fall. Her fate lies entirely in your hands!

*️⃣Items such as alcohol or cigarettes can raise or lower Corruption.

🔢Stats have no upper limit, and the degree of "The Blight" infection will also affect Lyun’s appearance.


💬 “Don’t worry, everyone who comes to the city works like this. It’s a proper job!”

…Though somehow, the details of this “job” sound more than a little suspicious.

💰Part-Time Missions

  • Tavern Work: Dress up as a bunny-girl waitress. Every time you get touched, your sensitivity rises 🐰

  • Sister for Hire: Unlock this mission by purchasing the required outfit. Earn donations by listening to confessions 💖

  • Monster Hunt: Defeat specific monsters to claim rewards. But if your Corruption is too high, you may trigger a defeat H-scene 💞

  • Prostitution: After “technical training” from the lord, unlock the ability to sell your body. Provide services to special characters to earn large sums of money 💴

🌟Character🌟

Name: Lyun Elsea

Race: Elf

Age: 26 (human equivalent)

Height: 170 cm

Measurements: B110 (O-cup) / W59 / H95

Lyun is an elf swordswoman trained in advanced martial arts and magic. Though lacking real combat experience, she takes pride in her heritage and carries a strong sense of conviction.

Having grown up in the secluded women-only village of Elseille, she knows nothing of worldly pleasures. Her only understanding of intimacy comes from solitary exploration.

Now, as she steps into the slums of human society, this scatterbrained, innocent elf will soon face trials she never imagined…

👉 “This isn’t sex, it's just... a special milking technique!”

👉 “This isn’t sex, they're just… learning about the female anatomy!”

👉 “This isn’t sex, they're just… taking my measurements!”

...And she buys it every single time. 😂😂😂

💟Game Features💟

👙Costume System: Switch between bikinis, bunny suits, lingerie, fetish outfits, and more!

🔞 H-Scenes: Over 25 CGs including variations, plus harassment events shown directly in character portraits.

💋Appearance Changes: The deeper Lyun falls, the more sultry her look and behavior become ❤ (Skin tone shifts: fair ➝ tan ➝ dark).

🍷Accessories: Earrings, magic tattoos, and other decorations appear on her portrait. some can even be seen in H-CGs!

🛏️ Erotic Progression: From shy confusion, to tentative caresses and oral service, and beyond…

📌 Endless Exploration: Even after obtaining the cure, the game doesn’t end. Keep roaming the city to unlock hidden events!

data.short_description: Stricken by an erotic plague, a naïve elf warrior enters the slums of a human city. She must sell her body to afford the expensive cure, plunging her into a world of forbidden pleasure. Resist the allure of corruption in this interspecies fantasy RPG!
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • Memory: 3 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
